scripts.dev: npx concurrently --names api,app --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev -w worker" "npm run dev -w app"
scripts.dev:worker-remote: npx concurrently --names api,app --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev:remote -w worker" "npm run dev -w app"
scripts.build: npm run build -w app && npx tsc -p worker --noEmit && npx tsc -p worker/tsconfig.scripts.json --noEmit
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w app && npm run lint -w worker
